# Mashudh Ahmed - Full-Stack Developer Portfolio

> Full-stack developer portfolio with a terminal-inspired UI, built with Next.js 16, NestJS, and PostgreSQL.

## About Me

I'm a passionate Computer Science and Engineering student majoring in Software Engineering. I build high-performance web applications with modern technologies and love solving complex problems with clean, elegant code.

- **Name**: Mashudh Ahmed
- **Title**: Full-Stack Developer
- **Location**: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- **Email**: mashudh.ahmed@outlook.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/mashudhahmed
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/mashudhahmed

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://mashudhahmed.vercel.app): Portfolio landing page with typewriter effect and hero section.
- [About](https://mashudhahmed.vercel.app/#about): Information about Mashudh's background, education, and skills.
- [Projects](https://mashudhahmed.vercel.app/#projects): Overview of full-stack projects with technologies used.
- [Skills](https://mashudhahmed.vercel.app/#skills): Technical skills categorized by frontend, backend, and database technologies.
- [Contact](https://mashudhahmed.vercel.app/#contact): Contact form to send a direct message.

## Featured Projects

### SnapCart – E-Commerce App
Full-stack e-commerce backend with NestJS featuring JWT authentication, role-based access control, product management, cart system, and order handling.

- **Technologies**: TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, JWT, REST API
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/mashudhahmed/ecommerce-fullstack

### BloodLink – Blood Donation App
Android mobile app in Kotlin connecting blood donors with recipients, featuring user registration and donor search functionality.

- **Technologies**: Kotlin, XML, Firebase, NestJS
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/mashudhahmed/blood-donation-mobile-app

### QuickBite – Food Delivery App
Food delivery REST API with 4 user roles (customer, restaurant owner, delivery agent, admin) with JWT authentication and role-based guards.

- **Technologies**: TypeScript, NestJS, PostgreSQL, TypeORM, JWT
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/mashudhahmed/food-delivery-fullstack

## Technical Skills

### Frontend

- Git/GitHub (Advanced), Postman (Advanced), Swagger UI (Advanced)

### Database & Tools
- PostgreSQL (Intermediate), TypeORM (Advanced)
- Firebase (Intermediate)

### Languages
- C++ (Intermediate), Kotlin (Intermediate)
